# Write fresh stream activity to ensure multi-signal assess_run_frozen
            # does not classify as frozen when run after HB thread tests
            import json
            (ws / "stream-activity.json").write_text(json.dumps({
                "kind": "stream_activity", "status": "streaming",
                "last_chunk_at": _iso_now(), "model": "qwen3:32b",
            }))
            state = reconcile_run_workspace(ws)
            self.assertEqual(state["status"], "running")


class TestCorrectCompletionNotification(unittest.TestCase):
    """Correct notification written on completion"""

    def test_completion_notification_has_required_fields(self):
        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
            audit = Path(tmp) / "audit.jsonl"
            emit_notification(audit, "job_completed", "job-001", "run-001",
                            {"ok": True, "summary": "all good"})
            entries = [json.loads(l) for l in audit.read_text().strip().split("\n")]
            e = entries[0]
